'''jatadha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:khaman|khaman]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-t-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:khaman|khaman]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| jatadha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jætædhæth|jætædhæth]] || [[word:jætædhæj|jætædhæj]] || [[word:jætædhæsh|jætædhæsh]] || [[word:jætædhæ|jætædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jatatadhath|jatatadhath]] || [[word:jatatadhaj|jatatadhaj]] || [[word:jatatadhash|jatatadhash]] || [[word:jatatadha|jatatadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jatadhath|jatadhath]] || [[word:jatadhaj|jatadhaj]] || [[word:jatadhash|jatadhash]] || [[word:jatadha|jatadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jatafdhath|jatafdhath]] || [[word:jatafdhaj|jatafdhaj]] || [[word:jatafdhash|jatafdhash]] || [[word:jatafdhaf|jatafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jatadhatha|jatadhatha]] || [[word:jatadhaja|jatadhaja]] || [[word:jatadhasha|jatadhasha]] || [[word:jatadhaka|jatadhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jatadhath|jatadhath]] || [[word:jatadhaj|jatadhaj]] || [[word:jatadhash|jatadhash]] || [[word:jatadha|jatadha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jatadhathal|jatadhathal]] || [[word:jatadhajal|jatadhajal]] || [[word:jatadhashal|jatadhashal]] || [[word:jatadhakal|jatadhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jatadhathatha|jatadhathatha]] || [[word:jatadhajaja|jatadhajaja]] || [[word:jatadhashasha|jatadhashasha]] || [[word:jatadhaka|jatadhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jatadhathan|jatadhathan]] || [[word:jatadhajan|jatadhajan]] || [[word:jatadhashan|jatadhashan]] || [[word:jatadhakan|jatadhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jatadhathaoro|jatadhathaoro]] || [[word:jatadhajaoro|jatadhajaoro]] || [[word:jatadhashaoro|jatadhashaoro]] || [[word:jatadhakaoro|jatadhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
